name: spritecook
description: Generate sprites, textures, and short animations in Codex with the SpriteCook MCP server and guided game-art workflows.

interface.shortDescription: Generate game sprites and animations in Codex
interface.longDescription: Bring SpriteCook into Codex with the hosted SpriteCook MCP server plus focused skills for still-image generation, animation workflows, credits checks, asset manifests, and consistent multi-asset game art pipelines.
defaultPrompt: Generate a tiny pixel art knight character, idle pose.
Animate this existing sprite into a short idle loop
Generate a barbarian warrior, with the knight as style reference
